creator: kkennawa@physics.adelaide.edu.au
text:
IMO ipf should definitely be in section 8 - after all, it's a command which
can only be run by root. Precedent: ipfw(8)

Kris

because by that time you will be a mile away and have their shoes."
    -- Unknown
